TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Chet_Aubuchon, title = Chet_Aubuchon, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chet_Aubuchon} }

S.FORM: Chet Aubuchon sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw tay suruw. kawas te 1916, byacing te 5 ru 18 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Indiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 178 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 62 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Chet Aubuchon sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw tay suruw. kawas te 1916, byacing te 5 ru 18 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Indiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 178 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 62 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħet auβuʦ~ʨħon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ taj s~ɕuruw taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa in*iana, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
